title: Can you automate the change of an end date on timeline when task completed
excerpt: Is there a way to change start date on timeline when task is done?

posts.author: christianPE (Christian Landry)
posts.cookedHtml: Is there a way to change start date on timeline when task is done?

posts.author: KimFarber (Kim Farber)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Christian,

This is not currently supported through the standard monday automations, however we do have a workaround available using an integration with one of our Apps.
Download App from App MarketPlace called Start+End=Timeline
You will then need add a Start Date Column and an End Date Column (which will be used to update the timeline) automatically.
Add the following Automation Recipe to your board: When ‘Status’ changes to ‘XXX’ set ‘End Date’ to current date

Then under Integrations use the following integration using the Start+End=Timeline App:

Screen Shot 2021-05-13 at 15.48.061233×206 19.4 KB

I hope this is helpful,
Kim

posts.author: system (system)
posts.cookedHtml: This topic was automatically closed 7 days after the last reply. New replies are no longer allowed.
